$schema_note: GitHub Repository Ruleset payload for caelo-cms/caelo-cms. Applied via scripts/apply-rulesets.ts. Edit this file via PR; do NOT edit the ruleset in the GitHub UI directly or the next apply run will revert it.
name: main-protection

required_status_checks._note: Matrix job in .github/workflows/release-images.yml. Added in #54 to catch regressions that only surface in the lean production Docker image (the bug class #53 fixed).
Matrix job in .github/workflows/release-images.yml. Added in #54 alongside the admin job for the same reason.

Job in .github/workflows/ci.yml (admin-prod-image). Added in #55 — release-images catches build-time regressions; this catches boot-time `Cannot find module` regressions that the build-only matrix can't (the bug class #53 fixed crashes on `docker run`, not on `docker build`).

Code-scanning check emitted by .github/workflows/codeql.yml (issue #26). Blocks merge until CodeQL analysis passes; high-or-higher-severity findings fail it. The merge-time severity threshold is set in repo Settings -> Code security -> Protection rules. CAUTION: confirm this context string matches the name GitHub reports on a real CodeQL run before applying via `bun run rulesets:apply` — a non-existent required check would block all merges (plan R1).
